visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen layout. On the left, a bearded man eats a large green leaf, and on the right, a young woman with black hair in pigtails and a blue tracksuit jacket points at the screen. (2) The scene transitions to the woman holding a clear plastic container filled with green, succulent-like vegetables called ice plants. She picks one up, showing the tiny, glistening, water-filled cells on the surface that look like frost or ice crystals. (3) She brings a bunch of the ice plant to her mouth and takes a large bite. Her facial expression shows genuine surprise with wide eyes and raised eyebrows as she chews. (4) A close-up shot focuses on the detailed texture of the ice plant's stem and leaves, emphasizing the 'frozen' appearance of the plant's surface. (5) The woman is shown holding a large metal bowl overflowing with the green ice plants. She continues to eat them one by one, looking directly at the camera with an impressed expression. (6) She opens a small white container of yogurt or dip. She dips a piece of the ice plant into the white substance and eats it, nodding her head in approval and smiling to indicate it tastes good. (7) The video concludes with her holding the bowl and talking to the camera, still dressed in her blue tracksuit in an indoor room with colorful decorations on the wall behind her.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 吃起來很像洋芋片? 海外爆紅 🧊冰花菜🥦 蔬菜還是洋芋片? [Logo]: 來源抖音 Firas Makk. (2) [Subtitle]: 本身就是「冰過」的口感的蔬菜? (3) [Subtitle]: 實驗歐膩🇰🇷 買了! 這個網路上就能買得到 原料澎湖有冰花菜😳 (4) [Subtitle]: 真的很像冷凍過的樣子. [Variety]: 神 奇. (5) [Subtitle]: 沒有冰過! 但已經有結冰的樣子! (6) [Subtitle]: 卡茲 是從來沒吃過的口感跟味道! [Variety]: (收到衝擊). (7) [Subtitle]: 有可能只有根才會這樣? 不不!! 葉子也是欸! 大家吃過冰花菜嗎? (8) [Subtitle]: 而且根是空心! 我一開始以為這個會不會跟水蓮或蒜薹差不多的口感. [Variety]: 竟然不一樣. (9) [Subtitle]: 有那種玉米 葡萄的口感 我要配優格看看! 想到芹菜會沾美乃滋 這樣更好吃欸!!! (10) [Subtitle]: 如果蔬菜都是這種口感的話 我可以每天吃🥰 有點想加醬油跟辣椒粉 做成韓式蔬菜的樣子吃!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on the right, 1 male on the split-screen reference video on the left.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair tied in two pigtails decorated with cherry-shaped hair ties. She is wearing a bright blue athletic tracksuit jacket with white stripes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor room with white walls, decorated with colorful posters and small plush toys. A bright, rainbow-colored 'HAPPINESS IS HAPPENING' sign is visible behind her.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop background music begins with a clear electronic beat. A young woman's voice introduces the ice plant in an enthusiastic tone. (2) A very loud and sharp 'crunch' sound effect, similar to biting into a crisp potato chip, triggers as the vegetable is eaten. (3) The narration continues with high energy, explaining the plant's unique texture. (4) A rapid series of crisp, rhythmic crunching sounds follow as the host eats several pieces, dominating the audio track with ASMR-like intensity. (5) A small 'pop' sound effect is heard when she opens a plastic container, followed by the sound of a lid being removed. (6) The video concludes with the woman summarizing her experience over the continuing upbeat BGM and occasional crunching transients.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Tasting Test -> Variety Test -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and showcase the unique sensory experience of eating ice plants, highlighting their surprising potato-chip-like crunch and refreshing texture both plain and with dip.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes strong ASMR audio cues (crunching) to emphasize the unique physical property of the ice plant vegetable. The fast-paced editing and bright colors are typical of social media short-form content.
